pattern: Build the numbers digit by digit, branching to each next digit that sits exactly k above or below the current one, which prunes the search to only valid prefixes.
hints: Every valid number is grown one digit at a time, and the first digit cannot be zero.
From a current last digit d, the only legal next digits are d+k and d-k, both kept within 0..9.
Start from each leading digit 1..9 and recurse, appending d+k and (when k>0) d-k until the length reaches n.

edge_inputs.description: length three with a large step
step zero gives repeated-digit numbers only
shortest length with the largest step
long length with zero step has nine answers
step too large for some starts prunes branches

stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = rng.randint(2, 9)
    k = rng.randint(0, 9)
    return [n, k]
stress.note: answer set stays small for all n,k in range
